lightweightFixSignals: focused safety correction: unsupported generic-form allergen positives removed

proposedChanges: Use the official national menu boundary and retain only named current food/nonalcoholic products.
Exclude alcohol, options/crust selectors, category/step headings, and catering/package artifacts.
Keep direct positive semantics only where frozen claims use canonical tokens; do not infer absent allergens or may-contain values.
Removed direct positives not self-evident from exact item names; retained only named salmon/shrimp/cheese/butter identities with official-menu evidence.
